Commitment to Excellence
Our Story

Excellence Is Not a Goal —
It Is a Way of Doing Things.

At PECAN NOBLE, we are an Argentine company with more than 40 years of agricultural experience, built on values of commitment, responsibility and respect for the land. Over the decades, we have developed products for demanding markets, understanding that quality begins long before harvest.


Today, we bring all that experience to premium pecans, carefully cultivated to deliver superior flavor, texture and presentation while meeting the highest international standards.


Get in Touch →
Our Philosophy

Excellence in Every Harvest

We believe in responsible production, continuous improvement and the relentless pursuit of excellence. Every pecan bearing the PECAN NOBLE name represents our commitment to quality, traceability and trust.

From Argentina to the finest tables in the world.

Why Choose Us

Why PECAN NOBLE

✦

Premium Quality

Carefully selected for superior flavor, size and consistency. Every batch meets our uncompromising standards before leaving the farm.

◉

Single Origin

100% Argentine pecans, cultivated in our own orchards. Full traceability from orchard to your door — you always know where your product comes from.

◈

International Standards

Produced to meet global export requirements and the highest quality expectations of international buyers, importers and distributors.

❧

Sustainable Production

Respecting the land, the environment and future generations. Our agricultural practices prioritize long-term stewardship over short-term gains.

The Product

Premium Argentine Pecans

Available in-shell and shelled, selected for caliber, color and flavor. Our pecans represent the natural richness of Argentine soil.

Our Commitment

Quality You Can
Count On

Every step of our process is designed to deliver consistency, safety and excellence to our international partners.

  • Uncompromising quality control at every stage
  • Sustainable and responsible production practices
  • Full traceability from orchard to shipment
  • International export standards compliance
  • Long-term business relationships built on trust
  • Consistent supply and reliable delivery
Proudly Argentine

Born From
Argentine Soil

Cultivated in rich Argentine soils and produced under strict quality standards, our pecans represent the excellence and natural abundance of Argentina — one of the world's premier pecan-growing regions.


The temperate climate and fertile lands of Argentina provide ideal conditions for developing pecans with exceptional flavor profile and consistent size.

Global Supply

Supplying the World's
Finest Markets

PECAN NOBLE works with international partners, distributors and importers seeking premium pecans from Argentina. We are committed to building long-term relationships based on trust, consistency and quality.

North America USA · Canada · Mexico
Europe Germany · UK · France · Benelux
Asia Pacific China · Japan · Australia
Middle East UAE · Saudi Arabia · Qatar
Latin America Brazil · Chile · Colombia
Worldwide Open to all markets globally
